title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Lovely Professional University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
